tour.welcome.title: Welcome to Seazn Club 👋
tour.welcome.body: A quick tour of the essentials — your organisation, settings and creating your first competition. Takes under a minute.
tour.org-chip.title: Your organisation
tour.org-chip.body: Everything you create lives under this organisation. Next, let's see where you can rename it.
tour.org-rename.title: Rename your organisation
tour.org-rename.body: Type a new name here and save. The tabs on the left cover your team, plan and API keys — next, let's set up getting paid.
tour.connect.title: Get paid
tour.connect.body: Connect Stripe to take card entry fees — payouts land straight in your bank. You're sent to Stripe's secure onboarding; Seazn Club never sees your details.
tour.billing.title: Your plan & billing
tour.billing.body: You're on the free Community plan. Track usage, view invoices and upgrade to Pro here whenever you're ready.
tour.new-competition.title: Create a competition
tour.new-competition.body: A competition holds one or more divisions — each with its own sport, entrants and format. Let's start one.
tour.wizard.title: Your first competition
tour.wizard.body: Follow the wizard: name it, add a division, pick a sport and format. Replay this tour anytime from Settings → Organisation.
